text:
. was the father of Conny Springer and a resident in Ragako village. He was transformed into a Titan by the Beast Titan during Wall Rose's supposed breach.

Appearance

Human form

Conny's father was a fairly tall, middle aged man with a small, clean beard, short, black hair, and a mustache. He was portrayed wearing a formal outfit with a tie.

Pure Titan form

As a Titan, Conny's father retained nearly all of his former physical characteristics, though now with a gaunt rib cage and shorter, lighter, hair. In this form, he stood at around tall.

Story

Clash of the Titans arc

Conny's father is one of the victims gassed by Marleyan soldiers before being turned into a Titan by Zeke Jaeger at the start of Wall Rose's Titan invasion.

Conny's father's Titan comes across a newly settled village where it enters into a home housing a small girl and her mother. Conny's father's Titan begins eating the mother's leg until Sasha Braus, assisting in Wall Rose's evacuation, attempts to kill him. However, her efforts with a common chopping axe prove ineffective, and she is left with no choice but to take the girl and escape.

Conny's father's Titan pursues Sasha and the girl outside of the village, where Sasha confronts the Titan. Using a bow and arrow, Sasha blinds one of the Titan's and physically stabs another arrow into its other eye. She then uses the blood from the woman's leg to escape Conny's father's grasp. Conny's father would later be killed by the Scout Regiment at some point during the week before Wall Rose was declared Titan-free.

People killed

At least one resident of Wall Rose (unintentional as a Pure Titan)

Failed attempts

Sasha Braus (unintentional as a Pure Titan)

Trivia

While no direct link is made in the manga or anime between Conny's father and the 3-meter Titan encountered by Sasha Braus, Attack on Titan Season 2 production designs first identify this Titan as .
